title: The Seraphim Hunt Everyone
description: On pages 13–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Sanji, Vegapunk, Seraphim as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Woahh!! They're not listening to orders!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Those Seraphim bastards aren't messing around...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, straw hat! Rorona! Let's put our past grudges asides for now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: shall we join forces? If you take off these handcuffs, I'm sure we'll be useful!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If my orders aren't being obeyed, then that means...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the one who gave this command was vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If all of this was Cal- Culted...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The commu- nications being cut off...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: us being trapped in the barrier...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Then someone is out to kill us all....!!
